reference: My wife's blood pressure has bottomed out. She is lying in a tub of cool water and then hot water. She is very weak. She says she is feeling a little better. She went to the toilet, and I have never seen so much stool. She has been sipping water. It was very scary for a little bit.
text: My wife's blood pressure has bottomed out; she is lying in a tub of cool water and then hot water. She is very weak. She says she is feeling a little better. She went to the toilet, and I have never seen so much stool. She has been sipping water. It was very scary for a little bit.
